aronui.when_to_use: Use git_status to check which files are modified, staged, or untracked in the current Git repository.
aronui.output_shape: A string listing files with their status, e.g., ' M vaf/whare_wananga/cli.py\n M vaf/whare_wananga/runner.py\n'.

pitfalls.text: No required arguments; the tool accepts any input (including invalid ones) and always returns the current git status without error.

procedure: Call the tool with an empty object {} or any other input to obtain the git status.
The tool returns a string showing modified (M), staged, or untracked files.
verification: Verify that the output contains file paths with status indicators (e.g., ' M ' for unstaged modifications).
Check that standard git status formatting is used.
